textByHash.cfd620d2f4c9f4dc382f5d7b0cae628c8f178366: Careful Lathas. I have seen the horrors of war first hand. This is not something we should merrily jump into.
textByHash.6724fd6488c1b1ea06ca3ab7a055ff87349499d5: That would keep the fight away from any innocents, but it would be a great risk.
textByHash.598675a58c8b1de6119facd5f2d95c4ec3e750d9: Aha! I'm glad you are here! I am sending out various knights on an important quest. I was wondering if you too would like to take up this quest?
textByHash.8673dae40653bf137924dcfe2127dc4396c23418: Well, we recently found out that the Holy Grail has passed into Gielinor.
textByHash.f7d37d07860b6bae62d86cacaf2494ec3859ab7b: None of my knights ever did return with it last time. Now we have the opportunity to give it another go, maybe this time we will have more luck!
textByHash.42660eb6592081fd7e1241ba5c7468b491e19630: Go speak to Merlin. He may be able to give a better clue as to where it is now you have freed him from that crystal.
textByHash.ede0bca421255af26e66103426072cbec05f3b07: He has set up his workshop in the room next to the library.
textByHash.c55a566d724862d9e6dcc71b3edcadf236874ac5: Be sure that you come speak to me soon then.
textByHash.f4eca2f996df7336f3d5df57361bd06bd4ceb74c: Well, the Grail IS very elusive, it may take some perseverance.
textByHash.79534bb4af76b84d5d2b364f1c83d7903eb43f30: As I said before, speak to Merlin in the workshop by the library.
textByHash.1461e878a9044c0b7716e6832c59b4fb18031f7b: Ah yes. I remember young Percival. He rode off on a quest a couple of months ago. We are getting a bit worried, he's not back yet...
textByHash.1aedc6125fcaf5f99e75a358cbffdf427e6acb25: He was going to try and recover the golden boots of Arkaneeses.
textByHash.60ce8cdf7a13ad4d365632a51d11915547b7189d: Not exactly. We discovered some magic golden feathers that are said to point the way to the boots...
textByHash.251d58c75b76ba165d4a8005c7a848122de2e09e: Just blowing gently on them will supposedly show the way to go.
textByHash.131bdcf49c75a77a3306820d3eded67f6d0148e9: Free up some space and I'll give you a feather.
textByHash.eb242650dfc2761730dd98cb0fa3c6f75f81b8e7: Wow! Incredible! You truly are a splendid knight!
textByHash.31ff7a694ac25aacfbe6fdd6593b5bcb0b6090c6: Thank you for retrieving the Grail! You shall be long remembered as one of the greatest heroes amongst the Knights of the Round Table!
textByHash.4b75959b3d513b8423301a4445a650e4fd6672de: Very well. I'll await you here.
textByHash.fc893d4fe5153b0ae8935b185744e969168ba59c: Thank you! I was afraid that would be the end of me.
textByHash.3b9d57dde49a0a78fd139dfa55219cecc1067c35: The Black Knights? I thought Morgan did this to me.
textByHash.95b98594deeb4f9520bf1ae0c9a6a11741ab2f1f: You leave first and I'll sneak out in a few minutes. Meet me back at Camelot and I shall reward you generously for your aid.
textByHash.0b505a761a64f511268550132492ae95f4703425: Indeed, thanks to the disguise you gave me. I arrived back just as Merlin had kicked out the Sinclair children. He scared them off with a few puffs of smoke and frogs. He told them if any of them left their house
textByHash.c50e15c854f899b1115671915c0e707dd1ecdb8f: again, he'd turn them all into rabbits.
textByHash.944901290624a50eb87a57720ef9940b49c8384d: Indeed. We of the Round Table are greatly indebted to you for all of your help. I wish to reward you for all the help you have given us...
textByHash.7e018aeffd5b9dfcc0f6a4b4e2dda0c46c71cb34: Welcome, brave knight. I am always happy to see you back at my court. Please feel free to roam the castle and make use of the training grounds.
textByHash.7c826a54d20f944bae5932cf870997a04a831eeb: My knights train daily on the top floor of Camelot. There they test their skills and strength against each other. Because of all the help you have given us, I open this training ground to you as well.
textByHash.3fca8d03a44870b478ab7096f58b8e98387922e4: Speak to the squire on the top floor of Camelot - he will explain the rules of the training grounds in detail.
textByHash.0ff9c8cb7d80bf467965db41a83513f10f9ce47f: Welcome to my court. I am King Arthur of the Knights of the Round Table.
textByHash.784506f2d6bda4fb420d4b71c81014f53b9944bb: Really? Well then you will need to go on a quest to prove yourself worthy. My knights all appreciate a good quest.
textByHash.11e6a8ad4448123c38486cb8e811602bf045bc81: Unfortunately, our current quest is to rescue Merlin. He recently got himself trapped in some sort of magical crystal. We've moved him from the cave we found him in and now he's upstairs in his tower.
textByHash.b8b779a19a1802c472fecd65b11de28b223ecadd: Talk to my knights if you need any help.
textByHash.3816dcab967c3d561e73d0f289d26d28a0c9143b: Well then you must complete your quest to rescue Merlin. Talk to my knights if you need any help.
textByHash.0b99611fab9ab16a59b2dcfad5dd97481d47f15e: Ah. A good job, well done. I dub thee a Knight Of The Round Table. You are now an honorary knight.
textByHash.70d04891d32df4e04acf1a60fdb10cca07e4ac57: Well legend says we will return to Britain in its time of greatest need. But that's not for quite a while yet.
textByHash.38f0965067b6f8e7183aee085e1729723517884a: So we've moved the whole outfit here for now.
textByHash.c47f878b1a21a111202352ee66e1e938c7d2404b: We're passing the time in Gielinor!
